data.title: Write RED test: retry budget section structural boundary in implementation-plan SKILL.md
data.description:
## Story
d853-bf07 — Sub-agent retry budget with model escalation

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test that validates the retry budget subsection in implementation-plan SKILL.md before it is added.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-retry-budget.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_retry_budget_heading_present** — A subsection about retry budget exists in Step 3 of SKILL.md (structural boundary: heading like "Retry Budget" or "MAX_ATTEMPTS" present)
2. **test_retry_budget_sonnet_max_attempts** — The section specifies 3 sonnet attempts (MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 and sonnet both mentioned in context)
3. **test_retry_budget_opus_escalation_mentioned** — The section describes opus escalation with diagnostic context from prior failures
4. **test_retry_budget_user_escalation_after_six** — The section describes user escalation after 6 total attempts

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5: structural boundary only
- Uses the same structure as tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-task-description.sh

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-retry-budget.sh [test_retry_budget_heading_present]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-retry-budget.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker)
